segment.source: A section heading plus a sequence of feature rows that alternate text and image left and right, each row with title, rich-text description, image, and an optional 'learn more' link. Use it for: multi-feature product walkthroughs, 'how it works' narratives, service descriptions where each point has its own visual. Prefer 'Split Text & Media' for a single text–image row; prefer 'Feature Cards Grid' when features have no images.
